support_goals: Remote help for TV and Magenta problems
Managed support for the father desktop environment
Keep the parents' scan folders local and simple before any document automation is introduced.
Optional later dedicated Home Assistant home/site integration without exposing the Stockenweiler site directly to the internet
Treat the Stockenweiler Proxmox host and its local HDDs as a future complementary backup/storage candidate once management-first access is proven.
current_blockers: No first live remote onboarding has happened yet.
Current on-site main PC identity is still unresolved; operator stated on 2026-03-31 that the former main PC anchor was this StudioPC.

The Stockenweiler Tailscale bridge on stockenweiler-pve is prepared but still pending login approval; StudioPC still sees only 192.168.2.0/24 via toolbox and no visible 192.168.178.0/24 tailnet route yet.
Scan and media share lineage is unresolved across \\192.168.178.25\music, \\192.168.178.120\music, \\192.168.178.120\scans\Familie Prinz and \\192.168.178.187\ScansDrucker.
AnyDesk fallback is present locally, but recovered remote IDs are not yet mapped to live Stockenweiler device names.

Public DNS / DynDNS is only partially coherent: home and cloud resolve via yourparty.tech to 91.14.44.20, Paperless points separately to 80.134.168.100, and pve.prinz-stockenweiler.de has no DNS record.
Visible legacy host health is degraded: Home Assistant frontend loads but backend is unavailable, Paperless times out, Nextcloud fails TLS/SNI, and pve.prinz-stockenweiler.de does not resolve.
UCG and broader gateway work stay deferred while the operator 2FA path remains blocked.

StudioPC already has a local Windows WireGuard route for 192.168.178.0/24 via 10.0.0.2, but direct TCP/22 to 192.168.178.25 still times out; treat that local tunnel as stale until it is re-applied with elevation.

Stockenweiler PVE storage baseline is now documented: /mnt/data_family on sdb1 (932G) and /mnt/music_hdd on sda2 (1.9T) are both at 100% usage, so any future PBS reuse needs cleanup or reallocation first.
Local WireGuard Tunnel VPN is still running on StudioPC and cannot be stopped or uninstalled without an elevated admin token.
Windows hosts file still pins yourparty.tech and www.yourparty.tech to 192.168.178.175; removing those stale lines needs an elevated admin token.

Paperless currently times out on port 443.
Nextcloud currently fails with ERR_SSL_UNRECOGNIZED_NAME_ALERT, which points to a reverse-proxy or certificate SNI mismatch.

findings.note: The Home Assistant frontend loads, but it immediately shows 'Unable to connect to Home Assistant. Retrying in ... seconds...', which means the web frontend answers while the backend service appears unavailable.

findings.title: N/A

cloud.prinz-stockenweiler.de resolves via the canonical name yourparty.tech to 91.14.44.20 but currently fails TLS/SNI.

pve.prinz-stockenweiler.de currently has no DNS record.

success_criteria: Main PC is identified as a managed support endpoint.
Phone is identified as a managed support endpoint.
Primary remote path is Tailscale or the fallback is documented as AnyDesk.
First support target can be routed without WAN admin exposure.

first_support_playbooks.goal: Restore basic TV or receiver usability without changing WAN exposure.
first_checks: Confirm whether the issue is TV, receiver or network only.
Confirm MagentaTV box power and HDMI path.
Confirm local IP still matches the known legacy signal or record the new one.
Prefer guided household steps before remote-control tooling.

first_support_playbooks.goal: Reach the main PC safely and help with the actual user problem.
first_checks: Identify the main PC host and OS first.
Prefer Tailscale if present; use AnyDesk only as documented fallback.
Do not create new WAN exposure for ad hoc support.

first_support_playbooks.goal: Unblock printing or scanning with the least invasive path.
first_checks: Confirm Brother model and whether the issue is print, scan or connectivity.
Keep the first working path local: scans stay in local Stockenweiler folders before any automation exists.
Do not route parents' scans into the FraWo business document path by default.
Treat a separate Stockenweiler Paperless database as a future-only option.

management_plane_bridge_candidate.goal: Prepare a management-first bridge between Anker and Stockenweiler without turning Stockenweiler into an integrated second site.
not_before: Stockenweiler is explicitly promoted from watch to active.
Main PC and phone are verified.
At least one real remote support case has been completed cleanly.
must_not_do: Do not build a Proxmox cluster over WAN.
Do not stretch Layer 2, VLANs or broadcasts between sites.
Do not centralize services just because routed management access exists.

service_consolidation_candidates.notes: Keep the current local Home Assistant for remote-support-first operation until device dependencies are documented.
Radio is not site-bound; host it later on whichever node has the more stable hardware and runtime characteristics, but do not migrate it now.
Only revisit a WordPress to Odoo move once the real family website need is visible and current content is mapped.
Keep the parents' scan folders local first; if document automation is introduced later, it should use a separate Stockenweiler Paperless database instead of the FraWo business path.
Explicitly keep local until the role of \\192.168.178.120\scans\Familie Prinz is resolved.

service_consolidation_candidates.current_stockenweiler_role: future complementary backup/storage capacity on the Stockenweiler Proxmox host HDDs
service_consolidation_candidates.notes: Treat local HDDs on the Stockenweiler PVE host as a future PBS or backup-capacity candidate once disk truth, connectivity and rollback are documented.

migration_blockers: Lane A remains active and Stockenweiler is still watch-only.

rollback_requirements: Any future bridge must be reversible from the StudioPC without same-day physical rework at the site.
Keep local Stockenweiler services reachable locally while phase 2 is being tested.
Document exact disable/remove steps for any routed bridge before enabling it.
Do not decommission any local service before a visible post-check and rollback path exist.

management_bridge_summary.goal: Professional management-first bridge without site marriage.
management_bridge_summary.route_acceptance_strategy: Do not enable blind RouteAll on StudioPC while it is directly attached to 192.168.2.0/24 and toolbox advertises the same subnet.
management_bridge_summary.next_operator_action: Approve the advertised subnet route 192.168.178.0/24 for stockenweiler-pve in Tailscale admin so the route becomes visible on StudioPC.
management_bridge_summary.next_codex_action: After subnet-route approval, re-run python scripts/check_stockenweiler_tailscale_bridge.py and python scripts/stockenweiler_remote_path_probe.py, then refresh the Stockenweiler reports and AI handoff.
